label: Neural architecture search

node.label: Neural architecture search
node.definition: Neural architecture search optimizes network topology, operations, width, depth, routing, or hardware placement with evolutionary, reinforcement, differentiable, or surrogate-based search.
node.why_it_matters: It can discover architectures tuned to accuracy, latency, memory, energy, or device constraints.
limitations: Search is expensive, proxy tasks can mislead, and reported gains may depend on narrow spaces or evaluation leakage.
